steps.title: Find the restricted total
steps.content:
The condition is that the person is at least $18$ years old. From the table, those groups are $18$ to $40$, $41$ to $65$, and greater than $65$:
$$
23\%+22\%+21\%=66\%
$$

steps.title: Compute the conditional probability
steps.content: Within the at-least-$18$ group, the greater-than-$65$ group makes up $21\%$. The conditional probability is $$ \frac{0.21}{0.66}=0.318 $$ This is about $0.32$. The answer is B.
